source.schemaPurpose: static vector/range descriptor, datatype-vtable, handler-body, and loose-corpus absence mapping for clean-room MissionScript planning

vectorHandlers.name: IScript__GetVectorLength
vectorHandlers.signature: void __stdcall IScript__GetVectorLength(void * script_args, void * unused_state, void * out_result)
vectorHandlers.summary: reads a vector through datatype slot +0x44, computes sqrt(x*x+y*y+z*z), and returns a CFloatDataType result via vtable 0x005e4ea4

vectorHandlers.name: IScript__CheckValueInRange
vectorHandlers.signature: void __stdcall IScript__CheckValueInRange(void * script_args, void * unused_state, void * out_result)
vectorHandlers.summary: reads value/min/max through float getter slot +0x34, accepts ascending or descending bounds, and returns a CBoolDataType-style byte result through vtable 0x005e4d50 context

vectorHandlers.name: IScript__GetVectorX
vectorHandlers.signature: void __stdcall IScript__GetVectorX(void * script_args, void * unused_state, void * out_result)
vectorHandlers.summary: reads a vector through datatype slot +0x44, copies component offset +0, and returns a float result via vtable 0x005e4ea4

vectorHandlers.name: IScript__GetVectorY
vectorHandlers.signature: void __stdcall IScript__GetVectorY(void * script_args, void * unused_state, void * out_result)
vectorHandlers.summary: reads a vector through datatype slot +0x44, copies component offset +4, and returns a float result via vtable 0x005e4ea4

vectorHandlers.name: IScript__GetVectorZ
vectorHandlers.signature: void __stdcall IScript__GetVectorZ(void * script_args, void * unused_state, void * out_result)
vectorHandlers.summary: reads a vector through datatype slot +0x44, copies component offset +8, and returns a float result via vtable 0x005e4ea4

datatypeContext.boundary: datatype vtables and getter slots are observed static evidence; exact concrete datatype/vector layouts remain unproven

looseMslUsage.boundary: private loose-MSL scan only; no direct non-comment vector/range command rows were found in the copied loose corpus during this proof
